name: validate
description: Framework health check combining isolation and mechanism compliance. Two modes: (1) Isolation — scan for multi-company contamination (scope headers, memory tags, cross-company conflicts). (2) Mechanisms — static smoke test of behavioral canaries from mechanism-registry.md. Trigger: "validate", "檢查", "health check", "validate isolation", "檢查隔離", "validate mechanisms", "檢查機制", "/validate".
